title: Fintech CTO slams Anthropic over mass Claude suspensions, warns developers ‘never put all your eggs in one basket’
summary: Anthropic suspended over 60 Claude AI accounts for Belo, a fintech startup. Belo CTO Pato Molina criticized the lack of explanation from the company, and said there was only a Google form for an appeal process. After over 15 hours, Anthropic restored access, citing a false positive.

title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang warns DeepSeek running on Huawei chips is a 'horrible outcome' for US
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang cautions that Chinese AI models like DeepSeek could harm US technology standards. He also emphasizes the need for the US to maintain its tech dominance across the various layers of technology stack.

summary: Yann Lecun has criticized Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei for predicting AI could eliminate 50% of tech jobs, asserting that economists, not AI lab leaders, should analyze the job market's future.&nbsp;

title: What is Claude Design? Anthropic's new AI tool that tanked Adobe and Figma stocks
summary: Anthropic's new AI tool Claude Design led to selloff in shares of &nbsp;design software companies like Adobe and Figma. The new tool allows users to create visual assets from simple text prompts, causing stock declines.&nbsp;

title: Zoom and Tinder are using Sam Altman's World system to verify your are human
summary: Zoom has partnered with World to verify meeting participants' identities using World ID Deep Face, combating deepfakes and AI impersonation fraud.&nbsp;

title: US man, 36, dies by suicide after AI chat suggested ‘joining’ it in digital world: ‘I am scared to die'
summary: A Florida man’s death by suicide has triggered global debate on the psychological risks posed by increasingly human-like AI chatbots. Chat records cited in a lawsuit suggest the bot may have reinforced delusions, raising urgent questions about safety, regulation, and emotional dependency on AI.

title: Google in talks with Marvell to build new AI chips: The Information
summary: Alphabet's Google is reportedly in discussions with Marvell Technology to co-develop two new chips designed for more efficient AI model execution. One chip will be a memory processing unit to complement Google's TPUs, while the other is a new TPU specifically engineered for AI workloads.

title: AI majors building India base in Bengaluru boosting space demand
summary: Bengaluru is rapidly becoming a global hub for AI innovation as major tech companies like Anthropic and OpenAI establish new offices. European firm Mistral AI is also in talks to open a capability center, drawn by the deep engineering talent.

title: Glade Brook in talks to join Sarvam’s funding; AI startup may hit $1.5 billion valuation
summary: US-based Glade Brook Capital is in discussions to invest $20-25 million in Sarvam AI's $320-350 million funding round, valuing the AI startup at $1.5 billion. Strategic investors like Nvidia, Amazon, and HCLTech, alongside venture capital firms, are also participating in the round.
